name: Crescent Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract.
2. Add flour and ground nuts to the mixture. Chill overnight.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Form dough into half moon shapes using teaspoons.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
6. Roll in powdered sugar before cooling.
